creator: nakaji@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
Guplot+ is updated to 1.2.0 and the restriction for use is
	changed to 'wishes' by the author. The contents of pkg-message
	is changed.

	Dependency on japanese/gd when the variable 'WITH_JP' is set
	is removed from Makefile. The variable 'WITH_JP' is also
	removed. Gnuplot+ depends on graphics/gd, japanese/vflib and
	print/freetype.

	MAINTAINER's mail address is changed.

Fix: Gzipped and uuencoded diff is attached below.
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
